---
name: checkcommitpush
description: In the current branch, run the formatting, linting, and testing suite, fix any issues, and generate a commit message that describes all changes that have not been committed yet.
---

In the current branch, run the formatting, linting, and testing suite, fix any issues, and generate a commit message that describes all changes that have not yet been committed. The commit message should follow the Conventional Commits format (described in the CONTRIBUTING.md file).

Use the Makefile in the repository root to run the linting, formatting, and testing suite.

Push the commit to the current branch after committing.
